title: O'Neal Winfree
compiled_truth: O'Neal Winfree is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-13 to 2001-05-25), O'Neal Winfree sent 5 and received 689 emails, totalling 694 interactions. Top correspondents: [Daren Farmer](people/daren-farmer) (3), [Julie Meyers](people/julie-meyers) (2), [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (1), [Tom Acton](people/tom-acton) (1), [Carlos Rodriguez](people/carlos-rodriguez) (1).
